May is Wildfire Awareness Month. Here's what you can do to prepare for wildfire season: 

- Don’t leave a campfire while it’s hot. Douse your fire with water until it’s cold to the touch 
- Never put vehicles on hot grass and ALWAYS have a bucket, fire extinguisher and shovel on
